section.title: Step 2: Configure main.ts
section.p: Action: Set stories glob, addons (essentials, a11y, vitest if testing).

section.title: Step 3: Wire preview.ts
section.p: Action: Add decorators for Theme, Router, ReactQuery providers.

section.title: Step 4: Author stories
section.p: Action: Create <Component>.stories.tsx with Meta + Default + variants.

section.title: Step 5: Add Chromatic
section.p: Action: npx chromatic --project-token=... ; add CI step.
